Ordinance.title: Ordinance
Ordinance.description: A municipal ordinance enacted by the Sangguniang Bayan.

title.description: The full title of the ordinance.

year.description: The year the ordinance was enacted (e.g., 2024, 2025).

fileUrl.description: The URL to the PDF file in Firebase Storage.

fileName.description: The original name of the file.

fileSize.description: The size of the file (e.g., 2 MB).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the ordinance was uploaded.

authorUid.description: The UID of the admin who uploaded the ordinance.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: A user with administrative privileges to manage ordinances.
